title: Cobblemon Skyblock
description:
A modpack to give players an easy way to play skyblock with cobblemon. 

Uses mods to change the world generation, allowing you to generate random skyblock maps. Comes packaged with shaders and extra resource packs.
body:
** I DO NOT RECOMMEND PLAYING SKYBLOCK IF YOU AREN'T FAMILIAR WITH SKYBLOCK OR MINECRAFTS GAME MECHANICS AS A WHOLE **


Modpack built around Cobblemon and Skyblock. A simple modpack with several Skyblock worldgen mods, Cobblemon, and a few optional resource packs. 

Made to have a more classic skyblock experience just with Cobblemon in there. Not every item will be obtainable, and many items will require substantial grind in order to obtain.
